languages.text: "Дарую тебе минуту жизни. Объяснись, откуда взялся этот "подарок" и что случилось с Янусом. Время пошло".

traits.locale_text: "Дарую тебе минуту жизни. Объяснись, откуда взялся этот "дар" и что случилось с Янусом. Время пошло".

languages.text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."
languages.original_text: "Дарую тебе минуту жизни. Объяснись, откуда взялся этот "подарок" и что случилось с Янусом. Время пошло".

traits.locale_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."
"I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."
"I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."
"I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

languages.text: «Le concedo un minuto de vida. Explíqueme de dónde viene ese "obsequio" y qué ha ocurrido en Janus. Empiece ya».
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: «Le concedo un minuto de vida. Explíqueme de dónde viene ese "obsequio" y qué ha ocurrido en Janus. Empiece ya».

languages.text: “我给你一分钟的活命时间。解释清楚这份‘赠礼’是从哪儿来的，以及加努斯到底发生了什么。现在开始计时。”
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: “我给你一分钟的活命时间。解释清楚这份‘赠礼’是从哪儿来的，以及加努斯到底发生了什么。现在开始计时。”

languages.text: « Je vous accorde encore une minute à vivre, le temps de m'expliquer d'où vient ce "cadeau" et ce qui s'est passé sur Janus. Le compte à rebours commence maintenant. »
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous accorde encore une minute à vivre, le temps de m'expliquer d'où vient ce "cadeau" et ce qui s'est passé sur Janus. Le compte à rebours commence maintenant. »

languages.text: "Bir dakikalık ömrün var. Bu 'hediyenin' nereden geldiğini ve Janus'ta neler olduğunu açıkla. Süren başladı."
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: "Bir dakikalık ömrün var. Bu 'hediyenin' nereden geldiğini ve Janus'ta neler olduğunu açıkla. Süren başladı."

languages.text: 「あなたに命を1分与えます。この「贈り物」の由来と、ヤヌスとの出来事について説明してください。あなたの時間は今からです。」
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたに命を1分与えます。この「贈り物」の由来と、ヤヌスとの出来事について説明してください。あなたの時間は今からです。」

languages.text: "Ich gebe Euch genau eine Minute. Erklärt mir, woher dieses 'Geschenk' kam und was mit Janus passiert ist. Eure Zeit läuft."
languages.original_text: "I grant you one minute of life. Explain where this 'gift' came from and what happened with Janus. Your time begins now."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe Euch genau eine Minute. Erklärt mir, woher dieses 'Geschenk' kam und was mit Janus passiert ist. Eure Zeit läuft."
